title: Subtitles for 46h short
wikitext:
[]: Subtitles for (-46h) short             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Mar 07, 2023 6:59 pm Just a topic for us people who are trying to stay spoiler free to share subtitles to be able to watch the short. I'm sure they won't take too long to come out.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by LinkingHeartZ » Wed Mar 08, 2023 2:02 am i ended up making a .ass file based on this twitter translation, with timing from the bilibili upload SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Mar 08, 2023 6:00 am LinkingHeartZ wrote: if anyone needs a .srt just lemme know

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 08, 2023 7:33 am I mean... they're just fan subs. I think it should be fine.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Mar 08, 2023 7:52 am Wow tht was even faster than I thought! Awesome! Thanks.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Mar 08, 2023 8:13 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I mean... they're just fan subs. I think it should be fine.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed Mar 08, 2023 8:16 am ^ Nope Forum rules wrote: Don’t ask for or provide links to illegally hosted copyrighted material.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 08, 2023 8:17 am Posting links to copyrighted material on the forum itself will get you permabanned, no exceptions.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Mar 08, 2023 8:49 am Thanks for the clarification

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by LinkingHeartZ » Thu Mar 09, 2023 1:52 am hello, the subtitles have been updated! once again, the main translation is by Diko_L on Twitter and further edits were made by scenik8. i was just here to help with the timing haha https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pC3Dl8 ... _TK3g/view

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Mar 09, 2023 5:53 am awesome! :)

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Thu Mar 09, 2023 8:31 am LinkingHeartZ wrote: hello, the subtitles have been updated! once again, the main translation is by Diko_L on Twitter and further edits were made by scenik8. i was just here to help with the timing haha https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pC3Dl8 ... _TK3g/view

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Mar 09, 2023 10:17 am nerv bae wrote: Translation question: one of Midori's lines is translated as SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Mar 10, 2023 7:04 pm Does anyone know of -120min. subs? Since the manga was translated already. I haven't found any.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by MsenjaKagami » Fri Mar 10, 2023 7:11 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Does anyone know of -120min. subs? Since the manga was translated already. I haven't found any.

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by dalagga » Fri Mar 10, 2023 8:32 pm nerv bae wrote: LinkingHeartZ#939511 wrote: hello, the subtitles have been updated! once again, the main translation is by Diko_L on Twitter and further edits were made by scenik8. i was just here to help with the timing haha https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pC3Dl8 ... _TK3g/view

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Mar 11, 2023 3:19 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Subtitles for (-46h) short (no spoilers)             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Mar 11, 2023 3:50 am This twitter mentioned some thing that Marina Ise (Midori's VA) comment in the stage greeting: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))
